mapper.insert: insert into t_post_label(post_id, label_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{postId},#{labelId},NOW(),NOW())

INSERT INTO t_post_label (post_id, label_id, create_time, update_time) SELECT #{postId}, #{labelId}, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_post_label WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND label_id = #{labelId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_post_label SET label_id = #{labelId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
